overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy exploring a coastal tribal settlement with wooden fortifications, wading through a shallow river, and navigating through a village area with NPCs. The environment features warm earthy tones, primitive wooden architecture, and atmospheric morning haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: tribal settlement platform with wooden fortifications and rope bridges

agents.ego_description: Aloy walking steadily through the wooden settlement platform, surveying the surroundings and passing wooden spikes and supply barrels

entered.detail: defensive wooden palisade with sharpened spikes surrounding the settlement platform
tall wooden structure with ropes and platforms connecting to higher ground
stacked wooden supply barrels and crates on the platform
wooden plank walkway elevated above the ground

segments.scene_description: Aloy walks across a wooden platform in a tribal settlement, surrounded by defensive spike barricades and supply barrels. Rope bridge towers rise in the background against a hazy morning sky with scattered clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow river passage beneath wooden bridge structures

events.description: character steps off wooden platform and enters shallow river water

agents.ego_description: Aloy wading through knee-deep river water, moving steadily forward beneath wooden bridge supports

entered.detail: large wooden bridge structure spanning the river with thick support beams and ropes
shallow clear water with visible rocky riverbed
tall reddish-brown rock formation lining the riverbank
defensive wooden wall with sharpened stakes along the right bank

segments.scene_description: Aloy enters a shallow river and wades forward beneath a large wooden bridge structure. Red rock cliffs line the left bank while wooden palisades defend the right shore, with misty jungle visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky shoreline path with tall grass and boulders

events.description: exits river and begins ascending grassy slope toward village
first NPCs come into view sitting on rocks near the path

agents.ego_description: Aloy climbing up from the riverbank through dense vegetation and large boulders, approaching a tribal village

entered.detail: dense patches of reddish tall grass and vegetation covering the slope
massive reddish boulders and rock outcroppings
primitive wooden structures and scaffolding visible ahead
tribal lantern suspended from wooden pole

segments.scene_description: Aloy exits the water and ascends a slope covered in tall red grass and large boulders. Wooden scaffolding and tribal structures become visible ahead as she approaches the village outskirts.

scene_state.functional_zone: tribal village path with wooden huts and NPCs

events.description: entering populated village area with multiple NPCs visible

agents.ego_description: Aloy walking through the village path, passing NPCs sitting on rocks and standing near wooden structures

notable_agents.action: villager sitting on rock near the path
villager standing with spear near wooden hut

entered.detail: primitive wooden hut with thatched roof and tribal decorations
large wooden gate structure marking village entrance
defensive wooden stakes lining the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: Aloy enters a populated tribal village, walking past NPCs sitting on rocks and standing guard. Wooden huts and defensive spike barriers line the dirt path as she approaches a large wooden gate structure in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the fortified outskirts of a tribal settlement, through a river crossing, and into the heart of a populated village. It begins with Aloy walking across a wooden platform surrounded by spike barricades and supply barrels under a hazy morning sky. As she moves forward, the scene shifts from the platforms into a shallow river, wading beneath a massive wooden bridge flanked by red rock cliffs and distant misty jungles. The camera then follows her as she exits the water and ascends a slope of tall red grass and boulders, where tribal scaffolding begins to emerge from the terrain. Finally, the path opens into the village center, passing guards and NPCs seated on rocks before heading toward a large wooden gate.
